name: Feature Request

## Problem / Motivation
A clear and concise description of what problem this solves.

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## DSL Example (if applicable)
```python
# If the request involves a new robot command, show an example usage:
robot.your_new_command(param=value)
```

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you've considered.
